title: Denial and distrust: explaining the partisan climate gap

tax_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: A carbon tax on energy companies and utilities that will raise the cost of using fossil fuels and incentivize use of renewable energy sources
tax_mentions.context: Table 1 includes explicit carbon tax item; respondents indicate support/oppose/not sure, and partisan gaps are decomposed for this policy (Table 3).
tax_mentions.notes: Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca decomposition estimates how trust in science vs climate denial explains partisan carbon-tax support gap.

inclusion_reason: Contains direct survey analysis of public support/opposition for an explicit carbon tax, with partisan gaps decomposed using trust in science and climate denial.
